title: Bridge Essay: Consciousness Without Content: A Look at Evidence and Prospects.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through Consciousness, Without, Content:, A, Look.

**Consciousness Without Content: A Look at Evidence and Prospects.** — Front Psychol. PMID: 32849160. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2020.01992. Many traditions in the East have proposed that consciousness without content is possible and could be achieved with mental training. However, it is not clear whether such astate is possible given that intentionality is acritical property of mentality and consciousness in many theories of consciousness. Aprominent recent attempt to account for such states of "minimal phenomenal experience" is the ascending reticular arousal system (ARAS) model, which proposes aspecific type of non-conceptual
